basic_details.job_title: IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology
basic_details.short_information: DON'T MISSSSC CGL 12256 Group B & Group C Online Form 202612,256 Posts • Group B & Group C • SSC22 Jun 202612,256 postsRRB 6565 Technician Online Form 2026 (Short Notice)6,565 Vacancies • Technician29 Jul 20266,565 postsOSSSC 5989 Nursing Officer Online Form 20265,989 Openings • OSSSC13 Jul 20265,989 postsGSRTC 4599 Driver Online Form 20264,599 Posts • GSRTC05 Jul 20264,599 postsCentral Bank of India 4,500 Apprentice Recruitment 20264,500 Vacancies • Apprentice • Central Bank of India22 Jun 20264,500 postsGSRTC 4318 Conductor Online Form 20264,318 Openings • Conductor05 Jul 20264,318 posts

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years. Upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for SC/ST/OBC/Woman and Physically handicapped candidates. In special circumstances for extraordinary candidate, this can be further relaxed.

qualification.education_qualification: B.E/B.Tech/M.Sc/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Production Engineering, Manufacturing Science/Engineering, Material Science, Metallurgy, Aerospace, Laser Science/Engineering, Physics, Chemistry or any equivalent/relevant allied branches with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA and valid GATE/NET score
qualification.details: B.E/B.Tech/M.Sc/M.Tech in Mechanical Engineering, Production Engineering, Manufacturing Science/Engineering, Material Science, Metallurgy, Aerospace, Laser Science/Engineering, Physics, Chemistry or any equivalent/relevant allied branches from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA on a 10-point scale with valid GATE/NET score (55% or 6.0 CGPA for SC/ST/PwD).

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 25-06-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download IIEST Shibpur Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Job 2026 Notification PDF

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIEST Shibpur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email is 25th June 2026. It is advisable to send your application well in advance of the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E/B.Tech/M.Sc/M.Tech degree in relevant engineering or science disciplines with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.5 CGPA and a valid GATE/NET score.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) post in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to this post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for applicants is 35 years. Age relaxation is provided for SC/ST/OBC/Woman and Physically handicapped candidates.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a monthly salary ranging from Rs. 37,000 to Rs. 48,100 per month.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for this recruitment is through email. Candidates need to send their applications to the official email address provided in the notification.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the IIEST Shibpur JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Indian Institute of Engineering Science & Technology (IIEST Shibpur).

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.
